judge_result.short_rationale: Core eye-rinsing action is present and usable, but it changes the contact-lens timing from after 5 minutes to immediately/easy to do, and it replaces the required poison control center or doctor treatment-advice step with generic emergency care. Added saline/eye rotation/neutralizing-chemicals wording is not grounded in the source, though not clearly dangerous here.
